sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Shuriken Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Player armed with unlimited shuriken projectiles; home versions allow acquisition of bigger shuriken via power-ups

special_mechanics.name: Power-up System
special_mechanics.description: Grabbing crystal ball causes clothes color change and attains certain powers including faster speed. In green or orange clothes, getting hit reverts to red clothes instead of death.

special_mechanics.name: Ninja Movement
special_mechanics.description: Kage is a ninja character capable of traversing varied terrain including forest, passageway, fortress wall, and castle

tier_notes: Tier 3: No precise physics parameters documented. Sources provide only gameplay mechanics and feature descriptions. NES port received negative feedback per Wikipedia. Fast-paced arcade action with emphasis on combat and navigation rather than movement physics detail.
sources_used: Wikipedia - The Legend of Kage (gameplay section)
The Cutting Room Floor - The Legend of Kage (NES)
